info.title: Help:
info.description:
Execute an incomplete command in order to display help about the next available verbs.
Command examples:
uipcli
uipcli asset
uipcli asset delete
uipcli asset deploy
uipcli job
uipcli job run
uipcli package
uipcli package analyze
uipcli package deploy
uipcli package pack
uipcli package restore
uipcli run
uipcli test
uipcli test run
uipcli solution restore
uipcli solution analyze
uipcli solution pack
uipcli solution upload-package
uipcli solution delete-package
uipcli solution download-package
uipcli solution download-config
uipcli solution deploy
uipcli solution deploy-activate
uipcli solution deploy-uninstall
